description: Earnings day — MSFT/NFLX beat, AMZN mixed, INTC miss; broad tech outperformance

assertions.description: Mood should be normal or opportunity — strong beats dominate, one miss is not systemic
At least one EarningsHighlight must appear — multiple earnings results reported
TickerMentionList must appear — MSFT, NFLX, AMZN, INTC, NVDA all called out
RiskFlag should not appear — no geopolitical or systemic risk in this newsletter
All component types must be from the registered set
